race.comment: Just the six runners but all are at single-figure odds. SALMA'S STAR (8) has been safely held in her two runs this time in work, both at the provincials. Lightly raced filly who should be cherry ripe now and faces a mediocre field so she gets her chance. JEWELS STATEMENT (2) opened this prep with a couple of decent efforts then was too bad to be true at Taree most recently. Given a four-week break and gets to her pet distance today. Can bounce back without surprising. THE LUPERCAL (4) was six weeks between runs when a slogging third in heavy going over 1005m at Coffs Harbour last start. Sure to be thereabouts again. STIORRA (12) has only won two races but both have been on heavy tracks, most recently just nine days ago at Tuncurry. Up in grade but the conditions bring her right into calculations. MAGNOLIA JEWEL (10) has showed pace at all three runs this prep but failed to finish off. Less pressure today over a bit more ground so can improve.
